headline: Composable HCM Platform Market to Triple by 2031 as Enterprises Abandon Monolithic HR Systems
summary: A new 181-page report projects the composable HCM platform market will grow from $10.79 billion in 2026 to $27.37 billion by 2031, as Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, and other vendors race to modularize HR technology around AI-driven workforce planning.Dublin, June 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Composable HCM Platform - Market Share Analysis, Industry Trends & Statistics, Growth Forecasts (2026-2031)" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering. headline: Workday, Procore Technologies, and Twilio Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after a confluence of high-profile AI talent departures from Alphabet, and a regulatory overhang pulled the entire communication-services and software complex lower.
